Statute.Title: Canada Infrastructure Bank Act
Statute.OtherLangTitle: (Banque de l’infrastructure du Canada, Loi sur la

Minister.Text: Minister of Infrastructure, Communities and Intergovernmental Affairs (SI/2017-40) and Minister of Finance powers see ss. 22 to 24

CIF.Text: CIF, 2017, c. 20, s. 403 (ss. 1 to 34) in force on assent 22.06.2017
CIF, 2026, c. 3, s. 202 in force on assent 26.03.2026
